Dear Dr. Lim,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 198765432A. Your monthly salary will be SGD 12,500, payable on the last business day of each month.

Your employee identification will be registered under NRIC S8765432D. You may access your onboarding documents at the following URL: https://hr.quantum.sg/employee/S8765432D.

Please note that the project plan you submitted will not be part of the initial evaluation process. However, we look forward to your insights on the current project status once you join.

This offer, the "SPA," is contingent upon the successful completion of all background checks and the signing of our employment agreement. Further details will be provided upon your acceptance of this SPA.

We are excited to have you join our innovative team. Please confirm your acceptance by signing below and returning a copy by 22 October 2023.

Sincerely,

Ms. Angela Tan  
Human Resources Director  
Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.  
Phone: +65 6789 0123

This offer is not valid after 22 October 2023.
